detail: Built status MATRIX (STATUS-MATRIX.md) + HTML dashboard + drift guard; run_gates.sh + pre-commit enforcer; honest tracker reset (139 overstatements cleared)
Verified Homebrew openjdk@21 (anchor) + openjdk@25 (forward) drive Maven via JAVA_HOME; no human install blocker

Capstones: add fintech-ledger + logistics-fulfil; wire reactor; update strategy docs

WS-C: 4th capstone (ingest/metrics/gate) built green; reactor = 4 apps + shared-platform
WS-D complete: 45 companion modules built green + 2 N/A (Ch01/Ch06); mvn -B -Pquality verify = BUILD SUCCESS, 0 Checkstyle/0 SpotBugs; check_snippets all PASS
WS-E: @pin/AHEAD-OF-PIN prose cleanup + per-module version sweep across the book; last 5 stale 'EXAMPLE-BUILD pending' headers removed

G3: CODE-REVIEW gate (FLOOR-C 2nd half) on all 45 built modules -> 45 _CODEREVIEW.md; ~14 shipped fixes incl. 2 FLOOR-A neutrality catches (Ch26 'beats' in suppression string, Ch84 'better than'); Ch03/Ch26 FAIL->upgraded PASS after fix; FLOOR-C COMPLETE book-wide
G4: WS-F machinery — 00_front-matter.md + AI-DISCLOSURE.md + README assembler contract; PROVENANCE-LOG refreshed; /assemble dry-run = 0/47 approved -> MANUSCRIPT pending
G5: 4 manuscript-level gate dry-runs — ORIGINALITY PASS (0 regurgitation), PROOF PASS-WITH-FIXES, REDTEAM PASS-WITH-FIXES, READERSIM FIX
G5 follow-on: cross-reference renumber dossier-key -> FINAL_INDEX printed number; 54 fixes; 0 in-prose refs >47 remain

G6: approval handoff primed (09-flags/external-review/QUEUE.md per-chapter lift targets, clean-first order); Phase G COMPLETE — all 47 drafted+lifted+figured+source-verified+code-reviewed, FLOOR-C complete, 0 approved (gated on external scores >=88%)
H1: 47 ready-to-paste external-scoring packets generated (one-pager per chapter for the independent different-vendor LLM)
H2: lifted the 8 chapters carrying independent scores (68-80%) toward the 88% bar; reusable gen_packets.sh added + packets regenerated
H3: applied the convergent dry-run MAJOR fixes — code fixes (Ch9/24/26 rebuilt green) + prose/claim fixes (Ch1/13/30/40)
H4: figure-caption renumber dossier-key -> FINAL_INDEX printed number across 18 chapters
H5: bounded web source-verify of the public-spec residuals (JEP/ISO) — partial pass; SaaS/web-only rows stay flagged

I4 FINDING: bumping house analyzer engines to the SOURCE-PIN top-lines was attempted and REVERTED — the newer engine rules break the chapters' teaching examples; kept engines at the taught versions, logged as a finding
I1: voice-lift continuing across the remaining chapters in printed-order batches (Ch1-21 done this phase); front-matter draft-filled (I2). 29/47 voice-lifted to date
review_figures.py: 67/67 pass hard checks (20-parameter review); 0 hard failures; figures.html refreshed
